Thanks for contributing to atl! A few pointers before you submit:

- CI must be green (`cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy -D warnings`, `cargo test` on
  Linux/macOS/Windows + MSRV 1.95). See .github/workflows/ci.yml.
-->
